rag_rules: Repair type mismatches in AGREE expressions by aligning helper declarations or operands to the actual AADL-sourced types, not inferred or generic names.
generic_rules: Only reference AADL-visible features or locally declared eq/const helpers in guarantees.
Avoid introducing new package-qualified types or identifiers not declared in the input model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, bool — never Integer, Boolean, or model-specific aliases.
Guarantees must use expressions of type bool; comparisons and logical operations must resolve to boolean.
anti_patterns: Do not fix type errors by adding new component paths, subcomponents, or external dependencies — resolve only via visible features or local declarations.
